Breaking: DOJ Probes Whether Russia Used Binance To Elude Sanctions
articles.description: Per a Bloomberg report, the U.S. Department of Justice (DOJ) is investigating the world’s largest crypto exchange, Binance, over yet another potential use of alleged criminal activity. This time, U.S. authorities are looking into Russian agents’ using the platform to circumvent financial sanctions. Related Reading: Crypto Crash: Do Kwon Could Be Facing Record-Breaking Jail Term […]
